title: Certificate verifier
subtitle: Check the validity of an EUDR certificate without an account.

input.drop: Drag the certificate PDF here or click to select it

result.doc_match: Document verified: it matches the on-chain record.
result.doc_mismatch: This document does not match the on-chain certificate. It may have been altered.
result.revoked_notice: This certificate was revoked on {{fecha}}. It is not valid for dispatch.

privacy_note: For privacy, the farmer's name and the exact parcel polygon are not shown.
